headlines.title: Thousands rally in Seattle for May Day 2026
headlines.summary: Thousands of demonstrators gathered in Seattle to mark May Day, continuing a 140-year tradition of advocating for workers' rights. This year's rally focused on labor rights, immigration reform, and opposition to federal policies including ICE. The event was part of broader regional mobilization with similar rallies in Tacoma, Lynnwood, and Olympia.

headlines.title: Seattle mayor's 'bye' remark to wealthy resurfaces at May Day rally
headlines.summary: Seattle Mayor Katie Wilson's recent comment saying 'bye' to wealthy residents who might leave due to a proposed millionaire's tax was highlighted during May Day demonstrations. Workers rallied for International Workers' Day with calls to tax the wealthy, protect immigrants, and disrupt business as usual. Hospitality workers also marched in Pioneer Square pushing to stop ICE agents from working as security at FIFA World Cup venues.

headlines.title: 5 things to do in the Seattle area this weekend: May 1-3
headlines.summary: Weekend highlights include the AANHPI Heritage Month Celebration at Seattle Center, the 40th annual Windermere Cup rowing races on Opening Day of boating season, the Seattle Black Film Festival, and Mariners home games. Sunny weather with temperatures in the upper 60s to low 70s is forecast. Seattle Restaurant Week also wraps up on May 2.

headlines.title: Seattle Mariners to retire Randy Johnson's No. 51 jersey
headlines.summary: The Seattle Mariners are honoring Hall of Fame left-hander Randy Johnson on Saturday, May 2, 2026, by officially retiring his No. 51 jersey at T-Mobile Park. The ceremony takes place before the game against the Kansas City Royals. Johnson becomes one of the few Mariners to have his number retired.

headlines.title: Seattle Seahawks 2026 rookie minicamp begins
headlines.summary: The Seattle Seahawks 2026 rookie class took their first practice reps in the NFL on May 1, 2026, at the Virginia Mason Athletic Center. First-round pick Jadarian Price will wear No. 8. Seahawks Legend Richard Sherman visited the first day of rookie minicamp to support the new players.

headlines.title: Seattle weather: Record highs possible this weekend
headlines.summary: Clouds and patchy drizzle Saturday morning will give way to sunshine, with highs in the mid to upper 70s. Record highs are possible this weekend as temperatures rise above seasonal averages. The warm weather coincides with Opening Day of boating season and outdoor events around the city.

headlines.title: Hospitality workers protest ICE presence at FIFA World Cup venues
headlines.summary: Hospitality workers in Seattle and other West Coast cities are protesting the potential presence of ICE agents at FIFA World Cup venues. In Seattle, workers marched to the FIFA volunteer office presenting a 'No ICE in our Cup' letter. SoFi Stadium workers in Los Angeles have also threatened to strike if ICE agents aren't kept away from World Cup games.

headlines.title: Mariners honor Seattle Steelheads, connecting Negro League Legacy to new generation
headlines.summary: The Seattle Mariners continue to honor the Seattle Steelheads, connecting the Negro League legacy to a new generation of baseball fans. The team has been highlighting the historical significance of the Steelheads as part of their community engagement and heritage celebrations.
